site.name: BEYLAB X
site.tagline: The Beyblade X catalog & combo lab
site.description: Browse every Beyblade X blade, ratchet and bit — then mix, match and share your ultimate combo.

admin.title: Superadmin
admin.subtitle: Search signed-up bladers, adjust stars, overwrite profiles and reset passwords.
admin.forbidden: This account is not a superadmin.
admin.loginRequired: Log in with a superadmin account.

home.heroSubtitle: The complete Beyblade X parts catalog — every blade, ratchet and bit with images, tiers and stats. Mix, match, and share your build with one link.
home.featuredSub: The current kings of the Xtreme stadium, ranked by community tournament data.
home.how1Text: Every Beyblade X part in one place — searchable in English and Chinese, with type, tier and product info.
home.how2Text: Pick a Blade, Ratchet and Bit (plus an Assist Blade for CX). Watch the stats and combo type update live.
home.how3Text: Your combo lives in the link. Copy it, send it, and anyone opens exactly the build you made.

catalog.title: Parts Catalog
catalog.subtitle: parts in the database
catalog.searchPlaceholder: Search by name (English / 中文) or code…

part.powerNote: Editorial rating derived from type and community tier.

builder.title: Combo Builder
builder.subtitle: Assemble your Beyblade X — the share link IS your build.
builder.incomplete: Pick a blade, ratchet and bit to complete your combo
builder.cxNote: CX blade — add an Assist Blade

rankings.title: Combo Rankings
rankings.subtitle: Real tournament results — the winningest Beyblade X combos, ranked.
rankings.note: Based on community-reported tournament results (Taiwan meta), aggregated by the stan-yao tier project.

tournaments.title: Tournaments
tournaments.subtitle: How official battles are scored, common formats, and where to compete.
tournaments.scoringIntro: A Beyblade X match is a race to 4 points — you score by how you win each round:
tournaments.overDesc: You knock the opponent out of the stadium.
tournaments.burstDesc: You break the opponent apart mid-battle.
tournaments.xtremeDesc: You blast the opponent out through the Xtreme Zone.
tournaments.winCondition: First blader to 4 points takes the match.
tournaments.f1Desc: Classic knockout brackets — lose once (or twice) and you're out. The standard for most Challonge events.
tournaments.f2Desc: Everyone plays a fixed number of rounds against similarly-scored opponents; top finishers advance to a final bracket.
tournaments.f3Desc: Bring a deck of 3 combos with no repeated parts. The winner keeps their Bey on the stadium; take all three rounds to win.
tournaments.findIntro: Brackets and signups run on the organizers' platforms — no account needed on BEYLAB X.
tournaments.challongeDesc: Official World Beyblade Organization brackets — live and past tournaments worldwide.
tournaments.wboDesc: Find sanctioned events near you, or propose one in your city.
tournaments.ttDesc: Official Beyblade X tournament schedule across Asia.
tournaments.myDesc: Official G1–G3 tournament announcements for Malaysia.

clubs.title: Clubs & Training Meets
clubs.subtitle: Join a community, show up, battle. No sign-up on this site — ever.
clubs.how1Text: Browse the directory — each card shows the region, what the club is about, and where it meets.
clubs.how2Text: Joining happens in the club's own WhatsApp / Telegram / Facebook group — no BEYLAB X account, no forms.
clubs.how3Text: Check the group for the next training meet or arena session, and bring your deck.
clubs.addTitle: Run a club or training meet?
clubs.addText: Get listed here — name, city, schedule and your group-chat link. Open a request on GitHub or reach out through any listed community.

market.title: Marketplace
market.subtitle: Buy, sell and pre-order parts with other bladers.
market.noticeTitle: Marketplace preview — transactions are not enabled yet
market.noticeText: Buying, selling and pre-ordering on BEYLAB X are still under development, so every checkout button below is disabled. Until launch, purchase through the reference store or your local club.
market.p2pText: Sell spare blades, ratchets and bits directly to other bladers — photos, condition grades, meet-up or postage. A preview of what's coming:

about.title: About BEYLAB X
about.p1: BEYLAB X is built and maintained by Andrew Yap, a Beyblade X blader and collector from Malaysia 🇲🇾.
about.p2: The goal: give bladers everywhere — in English and Chinese — one clean place to study every part, theory-craft combos, follow the competitive meta, and find people to battle.
about.sig: See you in the stadium. — Andrew

footer.disclaimer: BEYLAB X is an unofficial fan project. Beyblade X, all part names and product images are trademarks of Takara Tomy / Hasbro. No affiliation.
footer.credits: Part data & images courtesy of the community tier list by
footer.dataNote: Tournament tiers reflect the Taiwan community meta.

notFound.title: LOST IN THE XTREME ZONE
notFound.text: This page burst out of the stadium.
